Marktorientiert hat sich das Unternehmen auf die Fertigung von komplizierten geometrischen Werkstücken spezialisiert, so dass ein breites Leistungsspektrum rund um hochwertigste Dreh- und Frästeile abgedeckt wird.

Langjährige Erfahrung, Fachkompetenz und Flexibilität zeichnen den Metall- und Kunststoff verarbeitenden Zulieferbetrieb aus.

Die Hilmer GmbH garantiert kurze Durchlaufzeiten, schnelle Reaktionen und – bis hin zum Versand- und Lieferservice – höchste Qualität und Zuverlässigkeit!

Von der Beratung bis zur Realisierung profitieren unterschiedliche Industriezweige – im Speziellen:

- Luft- und Raumfahrt
- Automobilindustrie und Rennsport
- Forschung und Entwicklung
- Laseroptik
- Maschinen- und Sondermaschinenbau
- Medizintechnik
- Systeme für Schienenfahrzeuge, sowie die
- Verpackungsmaschinenindustrie

von erstklassigen Fräs- und Drehteilen aus Kunststoff, Metall oder Inconel, die in unterschiedlichen Ausführungen zum Einsatz kommen. Weltweit!

Auf dieser Basis sichern vielfältige Präzisionsteil-Ausführungen ein breites Produktsortiment, das – abgestimmt auf spezifische Kundenwünsche und Anforderungen – mittels modernster CNC-Technik professionell realisiert wird. Qualitativ hochwertiger Stahl, Aluminium, hochwertige NE-Metalle, nicht metallische Materialien wie Kunststoffe oder auch der hochfeste Werkstoff Inconel, werden in einer Flotte von modernsten CNC-Bearbeitungszentren und Drehanlagen mit Fräsmöglichkeiten bearbeitet und gewährleisten „Präzision in Perfektion“.

Description:
DTFLock is specializing in the R&D, production, sales and service of anti-loose thread technology. In 2001, this technology entered the Chinese market; And in 2018, the company was acquired by Zhenjiang New Energy(Main Board Stock Code: 603507) 

 "DTFlock" is the registered trademark of the company and the name of a high-precision self-locking thread anti-loose technology originating from the U.S. aerospace field.  With its unique thread structure design, this technology boasts excellent resistance to transverse vibration, fundamentally solving the problem of thread loosening and becoming an industry benchmark for high-reliability thread technology. The company has large-scale production capacity for fasteners ranging from M5 to M72 specifications, and has obtained national CNAS laboratory certification and AS9100 aerospace quality system certification. 

DTFlock anti-loose products are widely used in core fields such as wind power, photovoltaic, railway, automobile, urban rail transit, construction, machinery, bridges, port machinery and aviation. Its core customers include internationally renowned enterprises such as GameChange Solar, Array, Gonvarri, Siemens, Nextracker and Enercon

Name: CLEVEDON FASTENERS LIMITED
Description:
Clevedon Fasteners Ltd specialises in the manufacture of cold-formed components for use in the commercial and automotive markets world-wide. Formed in 1939, to supply the aircraft industry, we have always maintained the disciplines of technical competence, combined with outstanding customer service to forge a reputation for quality, reliability and rapid response to customer needs.

Our highly skilled workforce is dedicated to the manufacture of components to the relevant quality standard, within the required time frame.

We manufacture from ferrous and non-ferrous materials, in diameters ranging from 0.80mm (1/32”) to 10mm (3/8”) and lengths from 1.2mm (3/64”) to 120.5mm (43/4”) depending on the material required, its form and diameter to length ratio. Products can be processed (heat treated or plated) to any commercially available finish. Our delivery performance is further helped by in-house tool room facilities.

We deal with discreet, scheduled, or blanket orders, delivered to customer requirements either by week, day (Kan Ban) or even time slot (Automotive). On line proof of delivery ensures despatches are tracked efficiently to the customer’s premises. We export our products world-wide and provide a complete service from fastener recommendations through to machinery and tooling.

Finishing
Products can be heat treated and plated to any commercially available specification or finish.

Quality
Manufacturing tolerances and product dimensions are controlled to relevant British Standards and supported by quality approval from major customers in the relevant sectors. All products are manufactured under our BS EN ISO 9001:2008 Quality Management System. Individual customer quality requirements are also catered for within our quality system.

Name: C.M.I
Description:
CMI appartient depuis son origine en 1959 au groupe Thibaut, constructeur de machines-outils pour surfacer, polir, couper, calibrer et fraiser tous types de matériaux.

Suite à de gros investissements en 2004, le groupe a eu la volonté de développer une activité de sous traitance pour répondre à tous les donneurs d'ordres recherchant un fournisseur performant pour la réalisation de pièces de grandes dimensions (toutes les phases de construction des pièces, du débit jusqu'à peinture sont réalisées en interne).

Face au succès rencontré, le groupe en a fait une filiale fin 2008 prenant l’appellation de CMI (Construction Mécanique Industrielle).

En janvier 2014, le groupe Thibaut a fusionné avec l'un de ses partenaires historiques dans le Tarn qui construisait des machines pour le groupe. 
CMI, en reprenant les activités de constructions mécaniques de ce site s'est dotée d'équipements supplémentaires, complémentaires et a augmenté ses capacités de fraisage qui passent de  9 à 12 mètres 

Ce nouveau positionnement dans le sud permet aujourd'hui à CMI de vous accompagner où que vous soyez en France.

Equipements principaux :
1 Banc d'oxycoupage CN 4 chalumeaux
1 Machine de découpe laser 5Kw format 1500 x 3000 ( ep 25mm acier ; 20mm inox ; 12mm alu )

Name: TEKNOMECC SRL
Description:
Teknomecc Srl è una azienda che opera in diversi settori industriali, specializzata nella produzione di minuterie metalliche tornite e fresate su disegno del cliente.
Grazie a personale altamente specializzato e qualificato nel settore della tornitura e fresatura di componenti meccanici, Teknomecc è conosciuta e apprezzata nel mercato, ed è provvista di studio tecnico interno a garanzia di componenti di alta qualità.
La produzione è realizzata in diversi materiali: acciai automatici, da costruzione, da bonifica e cementazione, acciaio inox Aisi 303, 304, 316, 420, 430F, 630, 904,titanio, alluminio 2011, 6060, 6082, ergal, ottone, ecobrass,alpacca, bronzo, delrin.
Teknomecc realizza prodotti ricavati da barra da un minimo di 0,8 mm ad un massimo di 32mm.
Le minuterie metalliche, tornite e fresate a disegno, sono destinate ai seguenti settori industriali: meccanica generale, automazione, elettronica, accessori moda, occhialeria, dentale, medicale, telecomunicazioni, oleodinamica, navale, arredamento e refrigerazione.
Teknomecc è in grado di offrire ai propri clienti componenti con successivi trattamenti superficiali, quali lucidature, trattamenti galvanici, trattamenti termici e rettifiche grazie fornitori esperti che da anni operano nel settore.

Tutta la produzione è realizzata grazie all’utilizzo di un parco macchine estremamente flessibile di ultima generazione, che garantisce prestazioni eccellenti in termini di qualità e affidabilità, inoltre tramite l’utilizzo di software gestionali quali MES,MRP,SPC, Teknomecc garantisce processi produttivi monitorati in tempo reale.

Name: YNS REKSAN REKOR Hidrolik Makine İmalat San. Ve Tic. Ltd. Şti
Description:
Reksan Rekor, established in 1969, continues its operations under the name YNS Reksan Rekor following a change in the board of directors in 2017. Located in a modern facility spanning 4000 square meters in Ankara's 1st Organized Industrial Zone, we produce a wide range of hydraulic fittings, hose fittings, nuts, nipples, plugs, flanges, and various special fasteners. Our warehouse is stocked with ready-to-deliver products, always prepared to meet customer needs.

We aim to build long-term partnerships with our clients in the agricultural, automotive, and defense industries, where we serve as an approved supplier. By offering customer-oriented production for our OEM clients and emphasizing quality standards, we have established ourselves as a leading company in the sector. Our firm holds ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 certifications and strengthened our quality-focused structure by integrating an ERP system in 2020.

Our production principles are based on customer satisfaction, total quality management, and worker health and safety. Safety and quality during the production process are ensured through risk analyses, workflow plans, and regular employee training. The most important outcome of quality manufacturing is product safety. As YNS Reksan Rekor, we prioritize environmentally friendly practices in our production processes.

Our facility is equipped with 14 CNC machines, 5 multi-spindle lathes, 1 transfer lathe, 3 universal lathes, 3 universal milling machines, and 1 sliding headstock automatic lathe. Our raw materials are carefully inspected and marked during the initial control process. Our engineers and technical team monitor and control all processes with calibrated equipment. Additionally, we offer galvanizing, zinc coating, and phosphating services at our own coating facility located in İvoksan/Ankara.

Kalite, esneklik, teknoloji ve inovasyona dayalı sistemleriyle, TS16949 ve AS9100 belgesine sahiptir.

Üstek ‘in Türkiye de ki belli başlı devamlı üretim yaptığı iş ortaklarının yanında üretiminin % 60 i ihracat olup ,Almanya ,Belçika ,İngiltere, İsveç ,Hollanda ,İtalya ve Amerikaya ‘a ihraç edilmektedir .
Üstek’in diagnostik san ve uçak san için üretmiş ve üretmekte olduğu parçalar ulaştığı teknoloji ve kalite seviyesini ,inovasyona verdiği önemi kanıtlamaktadır. Üstek ,tecrübesi, esnekliği, geçmişten günümüze taşıyan müşteri odaklı üretimi ile dünya pazarlarında daha fazla yer almak için yeterli imkanlara sahip olduğu inancıyla geleceğe umutla bakmaktadır.

Name: LeankCo

Vizyonumuz

Sadece Türkiye’de değil, uluslararası pazarda da güvenilir ve tercih edilen bir bağlantı elemanları markası olarak sektöre yön vermek.

Değerlerimiz

Kalite: Her ürünümüzde uzun ömürlü ve güvenilir çözümler.

Yenilik: Modern üretim teknikleri ve sürekli gelişim.

Name: MAYASA TURNING
Description:
Mayasa, imalat proseslerini optimize ederek, tornalama, delik delme, delik işleme, frezeleme, diş açma ve benzeri prosesleri talaş kaldırarak istenilen geometrilerde parça imalatı yapmak için 2015 yılında kurulmuştur. 

Firmamız yüksek adetli ürün talepleri için özel makinelere ve özel prosesler geliştirme kabiliyetine sahiptir. Müşterilerin istekleri doğrultusunda geliştirmiş olduğumuz otomasyon sistemleri ile yüksek adetlerde minimum maliyet sağlayarak kaliteli mamuller imal edilmektedir. 

Uzmanlaştığımız mamuller arasında DIN standartlarına göre Mafsal (DIN 71802), Muylu (DIN 71805), Kürebaş (DIN 71803), Çatal Muylu (DIN 71752) ve türevlerini istenilen kalitede seri imalat yöntemleri ile üretmektedir.

Firmamız ISO9001-2015 kalite sistemi ile yalın üretim metotlarını birleştirerek en iyi seviyede üretim yapmaktadır. Kalite kontrol ve mamul sevkiyatı eş zamanlı olarak yapılmaktadır. Bu çalışma disiplini ile mamul kalitesi garanti altına alınmaktadır.

Bizim amaçlarımızdan bir tanesi de istenilen parçalara sadece bir şekil vermek değil, bunları geometrik boyut ve yüzey bakımından parça resminde tanımlı değerlere göre belirli bir doğruluk derecesine göre imal etmektir.

Üretimleri makine parkurumuz içerisinde bulunan CNC OTOMAT, CNC KAYAR, CNC TORNA, MEKANİK MAKİNALAR, işe özel tasarlanmış TRANSFER makinalar ile yapılmaktadır. Bunlar ile birlikte Konvansiyonel “üniversal” makinalarımız, torna tezgahı, freze tezgahı, ovalama tezgahı, matkaplar ile proses tamamlayıcı aparat ve sistemler bulunmaktadır.

Name: Xinchi-Industry
Description:
Xinchi Industry stands as a premier fastener manufacturer based in China, boasting an ISO9001-certified production facility. Established in 2007, our main factory spans over 30,000 square meters and is strategically located in Tianhuangping Industrial Park, Anji County, Zhejiang Province – known as the "Hometown of Swivel Chairs". This prime location offers exceptional logistical advantages, with easy access to Shanghai and Ningbo ports, ensuring efficient sea freight connections to global markets.
Our product portfolio extends far beyond furniture fasteners, encompassing a comprehensive range of high-quality fasteners. While we excel in cold-forged nuts – including T nuts, 4-prong T nuts (DIN1624), thread insert nuts, rivet nuts, sleeves, chair plugs, and screws – we also specialize in high-strength bolts and various other precision fasteners. This diverse offering positions us as one of China’s leading manufacturers in the fastener industry, and we are proud to serve as the designated supplier for "STAPLE".
Backed by robust R&D capabilities, we particularly excel in developing custom non-standard fasteners tailored to unique client requirements. Our in-house R&D and inspection laboratories, along with a subsidiary factory certified to ISO 9001:2015, underscore our commitment to quality and innovation. Complementing our manufacturing strength, we also operate a dedicated foreign trade company to provide seamless service for international clients.
Xinchi’s fasteners find applications across a wide spectrum of industries, from electronics, automotive and motorcycle components, to construction, wind energy, rail, bicycles, chemical engineering, furniture, aerospace, and solar energy sectors.
As we continue to grow, our goal remains clear: to establish ourselves as a first-class fastener manufacturer in China, dedicated to solving fastener and fastening challenges for customers worldwide through quality, expertise, and tailored solutions.

Our legacy dates back to 1965 when Esufali Salakar founded Maharashtra Iron and Brass Works (Fowl Brand) in Mumbai, establishing a strong foothold in the industrial fasteners. In 1985, Mustufa Salakar expanded this vision by launching Mustufa Iron and Brass Works in Grant Road, Mumbai, emphasizing high-quality fasteners and precision engineering.

In 2020, Huzaifa Salakar introduced Seido, marking a new era of cutting-edge engineering and superior durability. Today, Seido ensures SIP’s expertise reaches industries worldwide.

At Seido, we don’t just manufacture fasteners— we engineer reliability for industries worldwide.

Name: Cebe TEKNİK
Description:
Firmamız, ileri teknoloji ve yenilikçi çözümleri ile sektörde fark yaratan bir makine ve üretim firmasıdır. Bünyemizde bulunan 2 adet CNC torna, 1 adet CNC freze ve uzman kadromuz ile müşterilerimize yüksek hassasiyetli ve kaliteli üretim çözümleri sunuyoruz. Ayrıca, sac kalıp tasarımı alanında da uzmanlaşarak, özel üretim ihtiyaçlarınıza yönelik yaratıcı ve fonksiyonel çözümler geliştirmekteyiz.
Üretim hattımız, farklı endüstrilerin ihtiyaçlarına göre esnek ve özelleştirilebilir hizmetler sağlayarak, yüksek verimlilik ve hızlı teslimat süreleri ile ön plana çıkmaktadır. CNC teknolojisine ve sac kalıp tasarımına yaptığımız yatırımlar sayesinde, karmaşık parçaların üretiminden seri üretime kadar geniş bir yelpazede hizmet sunuyoruz.
Her projede müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutarak, güvenilir ve dayanıklı ürünler ortaya koymayı hedefliyoruz. Kaliteye ve mükemmeliyete verdiğimiz önemle, sektördeki en iyi çözümleri sunmak için sürekli gelişen ve büyüyen bir ekip olarak, sizinle iş birliği yapmaktan gurur duyuyoruz.

Name: Dongguan Guyi Hardware Products Co., Ltd.
Bulonera MAFERBUL
Description:
En MAFERBUL - PROVEEDORES DE SISTEMAS DE FIJACION somos mucho más que una ferretería: Somos el aliado ideal para todos tus proyectos. Desde el hogar hasta las grandes construcciones, contamos con un amplio catálogo que incluye tornillos tuercas arandelas y todo tipo de insumos esenciales para asegurar calidad y durabilidad en cada tarea.

QUÉ PRODUCTOS PUEDE COMPRAR EN MAFERBUL?
Encontrarás la línea más completa de buloneria y tornilleria de línea o especiales en los más diversos materiales como el Acero SAE 1008/1010, Acero SAE 1026, Acero SAE 1038/1040, acero SAE 4140, bronce o latón, acero inoxidable en AISI 304 (A2-70) y AISI 316 (A4-80), plásticos varios como polipropileno o nylon 6.6, y aluminio.
Nuestra ferreteria destaca por ser una reconocida bulonera en el mercado argentino. Disponemos de bulones de grado, bulones A325, espárragos B7 y tornillos allen bajo normas DIN 912, 916 Y 7991 entre otros productos, perfectos para la industria y proyectos de alta exigencia.

En MAFERBUL,comprendemos la importancia de la fiabilidad y durabilidad en la buloneria utilizada en los proyectos industriales de nuestros clientes. Por eso, trabajamos con las marcas líderes del mercado, fábricas de bulones argentinas e importadores, y garantizamos productos que cumplen con los más altos estándares de calidad y seguridad.

CONTÁCTENOS!
En BULONERA MAFERBUL - PROVEEDORES DE SISTEMAS DE FIJACION, tu ferretería integral, siempre estamos listos para proporcionar soluciones confiables y productos de calidad para optimizar los procesos y asegurar la continuidad operativa de los proyectos de tal manera, que su empresa encuentre en nosotros un proveedor responsable y eficiente.
